---
id: stremio-stream-lookup
title: "Stremio stream lookup"
description: "Searches Prowlarr for NZBs matching the given IMDB ID and returns Stremio stream objects with play URLs. Requires Prowlarr integration to be enabled. Filtering by language and quality is applied based on configuration."
sidebar_label: "Stremio stream lookup"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/4. API/altmount-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Stremio stream lookup"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/stremio/{key}/stream/{type}/{id}.json"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Searches Prowlarr for NZBs matching the given IMDB ID and returns Stremio stream objects with play URLs. Requires Prowlarr integration to be enabled. Filtering by language and quality is applied based on configuration.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  {...require("./stremio-stream-lookup.ParamsDetails.json")}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

  {...require("./stremio-stream-lookup.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./stremio-stream-lookup.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
